welcome.content: 👋 Parents, please complete this questionnaire to provide a holistic overview of your child, including their learning profile as well as their social, emotional, mental health, speech and language and sensory needs.

background_1.question: Why are you seeking an assessment now? Top three concerns in your own words.

background_2.question: Which areas are of concern? (tick all that apply)
background_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_3.question: How long have you had these concerns?
background_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_4.question: Has anyone (school, GP, family member) suggested a possible diagnosis?
background_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

background_5.question: Do you need this report for a specific reason?
background_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_1.question: Who lives at home with your child? (term-time)
family_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_2.question: Are there any special family circumstances we should know about? (illness, bereavement, separation, relocation)

family_3.question: Family history (tick all that apply):
family_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_4.question: Languages spoken at home
family_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

family_5.question: If bilingual, at what age was each language introduced?

birth_history_1.question: Was your child born at full term?
birth_history_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

birth_history_2.question: Were there any concerns at birth (NICU/SCBU, jaundice, breathing)?
birth_history_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_1.question: Did your child reach early motor milestones (sitting, crawling, walking) within the usual time frames?
dev_milestones_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_2.question: When did your child say single words and combine them into sentences?
dev_milestones_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_3.question: Were there any fine motor concerns (pencil grip, cutlery, buttons, laces)?
dev_milestones_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_4.question: Has your child ever received Speech & Language Therapy?
dev_milestones_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_5.question: Has your child ever received Occupational Therapy?
dev_milestones_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

dev_milestones_6.question: Which hand does your child use for writing?
dev_milestones_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_1.question: Is your child's health generally good?
health_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_2.question: Any history of significant illness, injury, hospital admission or operation?
health_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_3.question: Is your child taking any regular medication?
health_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_4.question: How would you describe your child's sleep?
health_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

health_5.question: Any specialised diet, food allergies, or selective eating?
health_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

vision_hearing_1.question: Has your child's vision been assessed recently?
vision_hearing_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

vision_hearing_2.question: Has your child's hearing been assessed in the last 2 years?
vision_hearing_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

sensory_motor_1.question: Any sensory sensitivities (sound, light, touch, food textures, clothing)?
sensory_motor_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

sensory_motor_2.question: How would you rate current gross motor skills (walking, balance, riding a bike)?
sensory_motor_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

attention_1.question: Is your child forgetful for their age?
attention_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section H - Memory, Attention, Behaviour at Home

attention_2.question: Does your child have attention and concentration difficulties?
attention_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section H - Memory, Attention, Behaviour at Home

attention_3.question: Can your child hyperfocus on a preferred activity (gaming, sport, music, art)?

options.label: Yes - finds it hard to stop

attention_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section H - Memory, Attention, Behaviour at Home

attention_4.question: Concerns about impulsivity, fidgeting, or restlessness?
attention_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section H - Memory, Attention, Behaviour at Home

attention_5.question: Does your child follow multi-step instructions?
attention_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section H - Memory, Attention, Behaviour at Home

social_1.question: Is your child happy at school?
social_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

social_2.question: Is your child happy at home?
social_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

social_3.question: Friendships:
social_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

social_4.question: Any history of bullying?
social_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

social_5.question: How does your child react when a task is difficult?
social_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

social_6.question: Do you notice difficulties with confidence, self-esteem or anxiety around schoolwork?
social_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

social_7.question: Has your child ever spoken to a counsellor, therapist, CAMHS or psychiatrist?
social_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_1.question: Has your child attended Nursery/Pre-School?
education_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_2.question: Has your child changed schools at any point?
education_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_3.question: If yes, please explain the reasons for the move(s).

education_4.question: Were there any periods of absence from school or difficulties attending school?
education_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_5.question: If yes, please explain in more detail.

education_6.question: Has your child ever been excluded, or placed on a reduced timetable?
education_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_7.question: If yes, please explain in more detail.

education_8.question: Has your child's start in formal education been disrupted (COVID, illness, school refusal, frequent moves)?
education_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_9.question: Does your child currently have an EHCP?
education_9.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_10.question: Does your child have an IEP / Provision Plan?
education_10.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_11.question: Does your child receive any additional support at school?
education_11.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_12.question: Has your child been previously assessed by an Educational Psychologist?
education_12.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_13.question: Has your child been assessed by other professionals? (tick all that apply)
education_13.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_14.question: Which subjects does your child enjoy and do reasonably well in?

education_15.question: Which subjects does your child find difficult?

education_16.question: Has your child received any special allowances (extra time, reader) for tests / exams so far?
education_16.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

education_17.question: Please describe your child's attitude towards school

education_18.question: Will your child be sitting any entrance / scholarship / SATs exam in the near future?
education_18.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_1.question: Does your child enjoy being read to / reading aloud?
literacy_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_2.question: Concerns about reading speed compared with peers?
literacy_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

literacy_3.question: Concerns about spelling? (Please give 2-3 examples of frequent misspellings)

literacy_4.question: Does handwriting tire your child or slow them down?
literacy_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

independent_learning_1.question: Does your child use a computer / tablet at home for school work?
independent_learning_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section L - Independent Learning at Home

independent_learning_2.question: Has your child been introduced to touch-typing?
independent_learning_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section L - Independent Learning at Home

independent_learning_3.question: Does your child currently use any assistive technology (reading pen, audiobooks, speech-to-text)?
independent_learning_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section L - Independent Learning at Home

independent_learning_4.question: Is your child receiving any private tutoring, therapy, or coaching outside school?
independent_learning_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section L - Independent Learning at Home

strengths_1.question: What does your child love doing? (hobbies, sports, clubs, passions)

strengths_2.question: What are your child's strengths, as you see them?

strengths_3.question: In three words, how would you describe your child?

closing_1.question: Is there anything else you would like the psychologist to know that has not been covered?

closing_2.question: Who should receive a copy of this report by email?

closing_message.content: Thank you for completing the questionnaire. Your responses have been recorded and will be reviewed by the educational psychology team.

complete.content: Thank you so much for completing this assessment!
